flaA.note: Shuffle these 48 single-nucleotide tiles (A/T/G/C) and arrange them in the correct order to rebuild the gene sequence, including its final STOP codon.

flaA.note: Shuffle these 16 single-letter amino acid tiles (including one '*' STOP tile) and place one under each correctly-arranged codon.

cadF.note: Shuffle these 16 single-letter amino acid tiles (including one '*' STOP tile) and place one under each correctly-arranged codon.
